hero.headline: A quiet refuge above the Aegean.

concept.label: The Concept
concept.text: Fifteen suites. One island. A space designed for stillness, not spectacle.

signature.quote: Where the day begins with light on water and ends in silence.
signature.label: The View

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Slow days. Open sea. Nothing in the way.

about.title: Our Story
about.label: About
about.description: A small, family-run retreat on the quietest of the Cyclades — built around the rhythm of the island, not the demands of the season.
about.islandDesc: Known as the Butterfly of the Aegean, Astipalea remains one of Greece's least-discovered islands — windswept, intimate, and breathtakingly bare.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We are at your service.
contact.description: For reservations, special requests, or simply to learn more — we welcome your message.

footer.tagline: Fifteen suites on the quietest of the Cyclades.
